message:
fix(server,tui): improve TUI screen rendering and unified inbox template

TUI screens:
- agents, dashboard: improve layout and data display
- analytics, archive_browser: enhance visualization
- messages: significant refactoring of message list and detail views
- system_health: expand health metric displays
- threads: improve thread navigation and display
- tool_metrics: expand metric tracking visualization
- projects: improve project listing
- cleanup: minor improvements

Template:
- mail_unified_inbox.html: significant template improvements for the
  web-based inbox view

Markdown:
- tui_markdown: improve terminal markdown rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
